recurring_credits.name: Chase Travel Hotel Credit
recurring_credits.description: $50/year on hotels booked through Chase Travel portal.

_review_reason: Schema rules applied (Kacey 2026-04-27): 1-yr DashPass excluded (Q4 = promotional, not recurring). Only $50 hotel credit qualifies. Reset cycle (anniversary vs calendar) defaulted to anniversary per most Chase Sapphire convention.
_excluded: DoorDash monthly credits — terms unclear from search, may require activation/eligibility
